prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDKIT11PC-2022-BUN Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit Prospecting Equipment with Classifier Screens, Dual Riffle Gold Pans Description: Discover gold the right way with the ASR Outdoor 11 Piece Gold Prospecting Kit, a complete gold panning starter set designed for beginners and experienced prospectors alike. Whether you’re searching rivers, streams, or creeks, this all-in-one kit includes the essential gold mining tools you need to pan, classify, separate, and recover fine gold with confidence.

This professional gold panning kit includes 2 durable classifier screens (1/2 inch and 1/8 inch mesh) to efficiently sift both coarse gravel and fine material. Built with rugged, high-impact plastic and reinforced wire mesh, these classifiers are designed to fit securely on standard 5 gallon buckets, making material processing fast, efficient, and portable for any outdoor prospecting adventure.

Included are 3 deep dual riffle gold pans in 14 inch, 12 inch, and 8 inch sizes, allowing you to scale your gold recovery process from large volume material down to fine gold separation. The dual riffle design helps trap both larger flakes and fine gold, while the green color enhances visibility so you can easily spot gold in sand, silt, and sediment.

This kit also comes fully equipped with essential gold recovery tools, including a precision gold pickup tool, sand scoop, magnifying tweezers with 4X magnification, and fine gold collection tools for handling small flakes and placer gold. These accessories help you accurately pick, inspect, and store your finds with ease and efficiency.

Perfect as a gold panning starter kit, hobby prospecting set, or outdoor adventure gear, this deluxe kit makes a great gift for beginners, families, and experienced gold miners alike. Whether you're teaching kids how to pan for gold or upgrading your prospecting equipment, this kit delivers reliable performance in the field.

Get outside, explore new terrain, and start your gold prospecting journey with a complete, field-ready kit built for real results. Search Terms: gold prospecting kit tools panning supplies equipment pans for beginners mining recovery rock hounding gem stones sifter sifting sieve sluice pickup complete set geology mesh riffle Features: - COMPLETE GOLD PANNING KIT FOR SLUICE BOXES: All-in-one gold prospecting kit includes gold pans, classifiers, and recovery tools so you can start panning for gold right away in rivers, streams, and creeks - HIGH-EFFICIENCY CLASSIFIER SCREENS: 1/2 inch and 1/8 inch mesh sifters quickly separate gravel from fine material, helping you process more paydirt and improve gold recovery results; both are constructed of heavy duty ABS plastic that is designed to fit on a standard 5 gallon bucket - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS FOR MAX GOLD RECOVERY: Deep 14", 12", and 8" gold pans feature dual riffle design to trap fine gold, flakes, and small nuggets while reducing material loss; the gold pans all fit neatly inside of the sifter screens, while the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes - PRECISION GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS INCLUDED: Comes with fine gold recovery tools, magnifying tweezers, black sand magnetic seperator and sand scoop, all of which will assist you in handling, inspection, and storage of gold flakes - HEAVY DUTY FABRICATION: Extremely durable, while being lightweight and portable all components from ASR Outdoor are field tested in real life and made to fit with in a standard 5 gallon buckets and are built for rugged outdoor use, making this gold mining kit enjoyable for camping, hiking, and family adventures === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
